name: IdsEdwAltFundDLoad

text.value: UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_D AS TGT SET TGT.SRC_SYS_CD=SRC.SRC_SYS_CD, TGT.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY=SRC.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY, TGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=SRC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, TGT.ALT_FUND_ID=SRC.ALT_FUND_ID, TGT.ALT_FUND_NM=SRC.ALT_FUND_NM, TGT.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_1=SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_1, TGT.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_2=SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_2, TGT.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_3=SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_3, TGT.ALT_FUND_CITY_NM=SRC.ALT_FUND_CITY_NM, TGT.ALT_FUND_ST_CD=SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_CD, TGT.ALT_FUND_ST_NM=SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_NM, TGT.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_5=SRC.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_5, TGT.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_4=SRC.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_4, TGT.ALT_FUND_EMAIL_ADDR_TX=SRC.ALT_FUND_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, TGT.ALT_FUND_EFF_DT_SK=SRC.ALT_FUND_EFF_DT_SK, TGT.ALT_FUND_TERM_DT_SK=SRC.ALT_FUND_TERM_DT_SK, TGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=SRC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, TGT.ALT_FUND_ST_CD_SK=SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_D AS TGT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.AFD_TMP_IdsEdwAltFundDLoad AS SRC ON TGT.ALT_FUND_SK=SRC.ALT_FUND_SK; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_D (ALT_FUND_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,ALT_FUND_ID,ALT_FUND_NM,ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_1,ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_2,ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_3,ALT_FUND_CITY_NM,ALT_FUND_ST_CD,ALT_FUND_ST_NM,ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_5,ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_4,ALT_FUND_EMAIL_ADDR_TX,ALT_FUND_EFF_DT_SK,ALT_FUND_TERM_DT_SK,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,ALT_FUND_ST_CD_SK) SELECT SRC.ALT_FUND_SK, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD, SRC.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY, SRC.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SRC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SRC.ALT_FUND_ID, SRC.ALT_FUND_NM, SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_1, SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_2, SRC.ALT_FUND_ADDR_LN_3, SRC.ALT_FUND_CITY_NM, SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_CD, SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_NM, SRC.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_5, SRC.ALT_FUND_ZIP_CD_4, SRC.ALT_FUND_EMAIL_ADDR_TX, SRC.ALT_FUND_EFF_DT_SK, SRC.ALT_FUND_TERM_DT_SK, SRC.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SRC.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, SRC.ALT_FUND_ST_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.AFD_TMP_IdsEdwAltFundDLoad AS SRC LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_D AS TGT ON TGT.ALT_FUND_SK=SRC.ALT_FUND_SK WHERE TGT.ALT_FUND_SK IS NULL
